Malic Dehydrogenase, placenta, Rabbit anti-Human, Biotin.
Streptavidin has a remarkably high affinity for its natural ligand, biotin.
Eggs also provide biotin, a structural component of both bone and hair.
And don't forget biotin, essential for metabolism.
